overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style medieval town. The character moves from a narrow cobblestone passage with stone arches down into a vibrant open plaza with colorful historic buildings and NPC pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone passage with stone balustrades and arches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow stone passage, passing under arches and alongside potted plants

entered.detail: ornate stone railing running along the right side of the walkway
tunnel-like stone archway forming the corridor
large terracotta pots with blooming red flowers placed along the path
historic building with green painted shutters and facade
stone staircase visible in the distance leading downward

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, sunlit cobblestone passage enclosed by historic stone buildings. Ornate stone balustrades line the path while potted red flowers add color to the scene. The area is quiet with no other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending to open plaza

events.description: turning left and exiting the narrow passage, revealing the open town plaza with the column monument
descending the stone stairs toward the plaza level

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and descending stone stairs while the view opens up to the town square below

entered.detail: tall classical stone column with statue atop, rising from the plaza center
distinctive blue historic building with ornate gabled roof

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and descends a stone staircase, transitioning from the enclosed passage to an open vista. The view opens up to reveal a sunlit town plaza with a tall column monument and colorful Mediterranean-style buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with central monument

events.description: child in blue clothing falls to the ground on the cobblestone path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, observing the surroundings and approaching the central monument

notable_agents.action: child in blue clothing running ahead then falling to the ground
two women sitting on a stone bench conversing

entered.detail: circular stone platform at the base of the column monument
warm-colored historic building with ornate windows facing the plaza
stone seating along the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the spacious cobblestone plaza filled with NPC pedestrians. The tall column monument dominates the center while colorful historic buildings line the square. A child in blue runs ahead and falls, while other townspeople sit on benches or walk about the sunny square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, narrow alleyway into a bustling, sun-drenched town plaza. It begins by following the character through a quiet cobblestone passage enclosed by historic stone buildings and ornate balustrades accented with potted red flowers. As the character turns left and descends a stone staircase, the enclosed space gives way to an expansive vista of a Mediterranean-style town. The scene then opens fully into a spacious plaza where a tall column monument dominates the center and colorful buildings line the square. Finally, the camera moves through the lively crowd of pedestrians, passing townspeople on benches and a child in blue who runs ahead and falls.
